title: Google Data Analytics Certificate
description: 8-course professional certificate covering data cleaning, analysis, and visualization using R, Tableau, and spreadsheets.

title: Introduction to Networking
description: Fundamentals of networking: OSI model, IP addressing, subnetting, routing, and switching concepts.

title: Pandas — Data Manipulation
description: Micro-course covering DataFrame manipulation, groupby, merge, and data cleaning with Pandas.

title: Intro to Machine Learning
description: Fundamental machine learning concepts including decision trees, model validation, and overfitting/underfitting.
